name: Zucchini Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together zucchini, water, apple juice, honey, salt, and cinnamon.
3. Add gluten flour, whole-grain wheat flour, oat bran, bread flour, and yeast to the wet mixture. Stir until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 9x5 inch loaf pan.
5. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Remove from oven and let cool before serving.
